Class TaxDataResource

java.lang.Object

      @GetMapping("/tree") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<TaxCountry>> getTree()

    • createCountry

      @PostMapping("/country") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<TaxCountry> createCountry(@RequestBody TaxCountry taxCountry)

    • deleteCountry

      @DeleteMapping("/country/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> deleteCountry(@PathVariable int id)

    • createYear

      @PostMapping("/year") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<TaxYear> createYear(@RequestBody TaxYear taxYear)

    • deleteYear

      @DeleteMapping("/year/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> deleteYear(@PathVariable int id)

    • uploadFiles

      @PostMapping("/year/{idTaxYear}/upload") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<TaxUpload>> uploadFiles(@PathVariable int idTaxYear, @RequestParam("file") org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile[] files) throws IOException
      Throws:
      IOException

      @PostMapping("/security-exclusion/toggle") @Transactional public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Boolean>> toggleSecurityExclusion(@RequestBody Map<String,Object> body)
